name: marketing_skills_for_ai_agents
description: A comprehensive skill set enabling AI agents, including Claude Code, to perform marketing tasks such as conversion rate optimization (CRO), copywriting, SEO, analytics, and growth engineering.

inputs.name: marketing_goal
inputs.description: The specific marketing objective to achieve (e.g., increase conversions, improve SEO ranking).

inputs.name: content_data
inputs.description: Raw text or media content to be optimized or created for marketing purposes.

inputs.name: analytics_data
inputs.description: Data related to user behavior, traffic, or campaign performance used for analysis.

inputs.name: keywords
inputs.description: Targeted keywords or phrases for SEO and copywriting tasks.

inputs.name: campaign_parameters
inputs.description: Variables defining campaign scope, target audience, and channels.

outputs.name: optimized_content
outputs.description: Marketing content refined for higher conversion, SEO value, or engagement.

outputs.name: analytics_report
outputs.description: Summary and actionable insights from marketing analytics data.

outputs.name: growth_strategy
outputs.description: A set of engineering and marketing tactics designed to drive sustainable growth.

patterns: SEO keyword integration and content optimization
Copywriting best practices tailored for AI generation
steps: Define the marketing objective and target audience.
Gather relevant input data including content, keywords, and analytics.
Apply copywriting and SEO techniques to generate or optimize marketing content.
Analyze relevant analytics data to refine strategies and measure performance.
Formulate and recommend growth engineering tactics based on insights.
Iterate and adapt marketing outputs based on feedback and new data.
use_cases: Generating SEO-optimized blog posts or website copy using AI.
Improving conversion rates on landing pages via AI-powered content adjustments.
Analyzing user behavior data to inform marketing strategy decisions.
Developing automated growth strategies for startups or digital products.
Supporting AI agents in executing comprehensive marketing campaigns.

prompt_templates.name: seo_content_generation
prompt_templates.template: Create SEO-optimized content focused on the keywords: {keywords}. The goal is to {marketing_goal}. Include engaging and persuasive language.

prompt_templates.name: analytics_insights
prompt_templates.template: Analyze the following analytics data: {analytics_data}. Provide a report highlighting key performance metrics and actionable recommendations.

prompt_templates.name: conversion_optimization_advice
prompt_templates.template: Given this content: {content_data}, suggest changes to improve conversion rates targeting {marketing_goal}.

prompt_templates.name: growth_strategy_development
prompt_templates.template: Develop a growth engineering strategy for a campaign with parameters: {campaign_parameters}, aiming to achieve {marketing_goal}.
